pi_items.source: Verified against task.json description line 6 and setup_task.sh line 21 which creates case with exact title

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task that creates a new complaint case in ArkCase titled 'Henderson v. DOJ – FOIA #2025-0472' (created via REST API in setup_task.sh). The agent is instructed to create a new task within this case with title 'Review Response Package for Completeness', priority High, start date 2025-06-15, due date 2025-08-01, details containing keywords about FOIA response package and Exemption 5, and assigned to arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com. All metadata claims match the task description and setup script specifications exactly.
